nav.backTo: Back to AI Solutions Demo Hub

hero.title: AI Solutions Demo Hub
hero.subtitle: Purpose-built demos for analytics, ecommerce, and research workflows. Test real business scenarios powered by multi-model AI systems.

home.supportMessage: The right model for the right task — routed automatically for business use cases.

demos.sectionDescription: Click into any demo to see what it does and try it with sample data. No sign-up required.

dataAnalyst.title: AI Data Analyst
dataAnalyst.description: Turn raw CSV data into trends, KPI snapshots, and actionable business insights.

ecommerce.title: AI Ecommerce Analyst
ecommerce.description: Analyze store performance, product trends, and revenue signals with AI-generated recommendations.

researchAgent.title: AI Research Agent
researchAgent.description: Synthesize complex topics into structured findings and decision-ready reports.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: From your data to business insights in three steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Bring in your CSV, ecommerce export, or research topic.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Multi-model AI processes and analyzes your inputs.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Get summaries, trends, and recommended actions.

footer.title: Powered by multi-model AI
footer.description: This platform dynamically routes tasks to the most suitable AI models (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini) depending on the workflow.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.responseModeHelp: Controls analysis depth and workflow style: quick highlights, structured analysis, or research-style synthesis.
advanced.modelProviderHelp: The underlying AI model. Auto Router selects the best model for each task.
advanced.outputLanguageHelp: Language for AI responses. Defaults to the current UI language unless you change it here.
advanced.reportStyleHelp: Format of the final output: concise summary, executive-style (KPIs, risks, recommendations), or detailed breakdown.

analyst.title: AI Data Analyst
analyst.subtitle: Upload a CSV or use sample data. Get an executive summary, KPI snapshot, trend analysis, and suggested actions.
analyst.uploadHint: CSV with columns: date, order_id, product, category, price, quantity, revenue, customer, country, channel.
analyst.askQuestion: Ask a question about your data…
analyst.welcomeMessage: Ask a question about your data. I'll answer from the loaded dataset.
analyst.suggested1: Summarize the main trends in this dataset.
analyst.suggested2: What are the top KPIs I should focus on?

ecommerce.title: AI Ecommerce Analyst
ecommerce.subtitle: See revenue and product performance at a glance, then ask questions in plain language. Upload your data or use sample data.
ecommerce.heroSubtitle: Turn store data into clear insights, trend signals, and growth recommendations.
ecommerce.heroSupport: The right model for the right task — routed automatically for business use cases.
ecommerce.askPlaceholder: e.g. What's driving revenue? Which products should we promote?
ecommerce.consultantInsights: Consultant-style insights from your data. Ask a question or generate a full report.
ecommerce.welcomeMessage: Load your data above, then ask a business question or click **Generate full report** for a consultant-style analysis with Executive Summary, Key Metrics, Product Insights, Revenue Signals, and Recommended Actions.
ecommerce.exampleQ1: Which products are driving most of the revenue?
ecommerce.exampleQ3: What trends do you see in the sales data?
ecommerce.exampleQ4: Which products should we promote more?
ecommerce.exampleQ5: What are the biggest risks in this store right now?
ecommerce.uploadHintColumns: Or use the sample dataset or choose a file. Columns: date, product_name, category, orders, units_sold, revenue, ad_spend, conversion_rate, inventory.

research.title: AI Research Assistant
research.subtitle: Define a topic and depth to get a structured report with summary, key findings, and recommendations.
research.topicPlaceholder: e.g. market landscape for AI analytics, competitor overview
research.exampleTopic2: Chinese ecommerce brands entering North America
research.whatYouGetDesc: A structured report with a topic summary, key findings, and a full analysis you can use for decisions.
research.emptyState: Enter a topic above or pick an example, then click Generate report to see your Topic Summary, Key Findings, and Final Report.

agent.title: AI Support Agent
agent.subtitle: Handle common questions instantly and hand off to your team when needed. Try the prompts below or ask your own. In production, this connects to your backend for live, accurate responses.
agent.welcomeMessage: I'm your AI support assistant. Ask about returns, order tracking, billing, or other common questions. Try a prompt below or type your own. In production, I connect to your systems for accurate, up-to-date answers.
agent.prompt1: What's your return and refund policy?
agent.prompt2: How do I track my order?
agent.notSure: I'm not sure how to answer that. Try rephrasing or ask something else.
agent.addApiKeys: Add API keys in Environment Variables for live responses.
agent.errorFallback: Something went wrong. Check your connection or add API keys in Environment Variables.

errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again in a minute.
errors.providerUnavailable: AI provider unavailable. Add API keys in Environment Variables.
errors.providerUnavailableQwen: Qwen is currently unavailable. Please verify DASHSCOPE_API_KEY is configured in Environment Variables and redeploy the app.
errors.providerUnavailableDeepSeek: DeepSeek is currently unavailable. Please verify DEEPSEEK_API_KEY is configured in Environment Variables and redeploy the app.
errors.providerUnavailableOpenAI: OpenAI is currently unavailable. Please verify OPENAI_API_KEY is configured in Environment Variables and redeploy the app.
errors.providerUnavailableClaude: Claude is currently unavailable. Please verify ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is configured in Environment Variables and redeploy the app.
errors.providerUnavailableGemini: Gemini is currently unavailable. Please verify GOOGLE_API_KEY or GEMINI_API_KEY is configured in Environment Variables and redeploy the app.
